# TodoMVC Angular documentation

> Generated by compodoc 2.0.0 at 2026-06-28T16:11:03.397Z, llm-md export.

## Modules

### AboutModule

File: `src/app/about/about.module.ts`
declarations: `AboutComponent`, `CompodocComponent`, `TodoMVCComponent`

Description: The about module Just embedding component and it's routing definition in AboutRoutingModule

### AppModule

File: `src/app/app.module.ts`
providers: `NoopInterceptor`, `TodoStore`
declarations: `AppComponent`
imports: `AppRoutingModule`, `HomeModule`
bootstrap: `AppComponent`

### AppRoutingModule

File: `src/app/app-routing.module.ts`

### FooterModule

File: `src/app/footer/footer.module.ts`
declarations: `FooterComponent`
exports: `FooterComponent`

Description: The footer module

### HeaderModule

File: `src/app/header/header.module.ts`
declarations: `HeaderComponent`
exports: `HeaderComponent`

Description: The header module

Methods:
- `forRoot(): ModuleWithProviders<HeaderModule>`

### HomeModule

File: `src/app/home/home.module.ts`
declarations: `HomeComponent`
imports: `FooterModule`, `HeaderModule`, `HomeRoutingModule`, `ListModule`
exports: `HomeComponent`

Description: The header module Just embedding component and it's routing definition in HomeRoutingModule

### HomeRoutingModule

File: `src/app/home/home-routing.module.ts`

### ListModule

File: `src/app/list/list.module.ts`
declarations: `ListComponent`
imports: `TodoComponent`
exports: `ListComponent`

Description: The list of todos module Contains list component which can filter types of todos : Type API completed displayCompleted all displayAll remaining displayRemaining

### TodoModule

File: `src/app/list/todo/todo.module.ts`
declarations: `FirstUpperPipe`

Description: The todo module Contains the TodoComponent

### AboutComponent

File: `src/app/about/about.component.ts`
Selector: `about`
Standalone: yes
Change detection: `ChangeDetectionStrategy.OnPush`

Description: The about component Display some text with links for details about TodoMVC & Compodoc.

- `onMouseup(): void` — HostListener mouseup description

### FooterComponent

File: `src/app/footer/footer.component.ts`
Selector: `footer`
Standalone: yes
Change detection: `ChangeDetectionStrategy.OnPush`

Description: The footer component

Properties:
- `currentFilter: string = 'all'` — Starting filter param
- `id: string = 'FooterComponent'` — Local id for EmitterService
- `todoStore: TodoStore` — Local reference of TodoStore

Methods:
- `displayAll(): void` — Display all todos
- `displayCompleted(): void` — Display only completed todos
- `displayRemaining(): void` — Display only remaining todos
- `removeCompleted(): void` — Removes all the completed todos

### HeaderComponent

File: `src/app/header/header.component.ts`
Selector: `header`
Standalone: yes
Change detection: `ChangeDetectionStrategy.OnPush`

Description: The header component

Inputs:
- `newTodoText: string = ''` — The data-binding value of the input tag, added on enter to the todo store

Properties:
- `title: string = 'todos'` — Application main title
- `todoStore: TodoStore` — Local reference of TodoStore

Methods:
- `addTodo(): void` — Ad a todo to the list

### ListComponent

File: `src/app/list/list.component.ts`
Selector: `list`
Standalone: yes
Change detection: `ChangeDetectionStrategy.OnPush`

Description: The list of todos component Can filter types of todos : Type API completed displayCompleted all displayAll remaining displayRemaining

Properties:
- `todos: Array<Todo>`
- `todoStore: TodoStore` — Local reference of TodoStore
- `watchTest: unknown`

### TodoComponent

File: `src/app/list/todo/todo.component.ts`
Selector: `todo`
Standalone: yes
Change detection: `ChangeDetectionStrategy.OnPush`

Description: The todo component Example : \<todo\> \[todo\]="todo" \</todo\> ../screenshots/todo/todo.png

Inputs:
- `todo: Todo` — The entry todo from the parent list

Properties:
- `todoStore: TodoStore` — Local reference of TodoStore

Methods:
- `cancelEditingTodo(todo: Todo): void`
- `editTodo(todo: Todo): void`
- `remove(todo: Todo): void`
- `stopEditing(todo: Todo, editedTitle: string): void`
- `toggleCompletion(todo: Todo): void`
- `updateEditingTodo(todo: Todo, editedTitle: string): any`

Selector: `[appBorder]`
Standalone: yes

Inputs:

Methods:
- `border(color: string): void`
- `ngOnInit(): void`
- `onMouseEnter(): void`
- `onMouseLeave(): void`

File: `src/app/shared/directives/do-nothing.directive.ts`
Selector: `[donothing]`
Standalone: yes

Description: This directive does nothing !

Properties:
- `color: string` — HostBinding description
- `popover: string`

Methods:
- `onClick(e: Event): void` — HostListener description 3
- `onMousedown(mouseX: number, mouseY: number): void` — HostListener description 2
- `onMouseup(mouseX: number, mouseY: number): void` — HostListener description 1

## Pipes

### FirstUpperPipe

File: `src/app/shared/pipes/first-upper.pipe.ts`
Pipe name: `firstUpper`
Standalone: yes

Description: Uppercase the first letter of the string Usage : value \| firstUpper:exponent Example : {{ car \| firstUpper}} formats to: Car

Methods:
- `transform(value: unknown, args: unknown): any`

### StandAlonePipe

File: `src/app/shared/pipes/standalone.pipe.ts`
Pipe name: `standalone`
Standalone: yes

Methods:
- `transform(value: unknown, args: unknown): string`

## Services / Injectables

### EmitterService

File: `src/app/shared/services/emitter.service.ts`

Description: A simple pubsub service using EventEmitter

Properties:
- `_emitters: { } = {}`

Methods:
- `get(ID: string): EventEmitter<any>`

### EmptyService

File: `src/app/shared/services/empty.service.ts`

Description: A simple empty service for disaplying providers in main graph

### TodoStore

File: `src/app/shared/services/todo.store.ts`

Description: This service is a todo store See Todo for details about the main data of this store

Properties:
- `todos: Array<Todo>` — Local array of Todos See Todo

Methods:
- `add(title: string): void` — Add todo
- `allCompleted(): boolean` — All the todos are they completed ?
- `getAll(): Array<Todo>` — Get all todos
- `getCompleted(): any` — Get completed todos
- `getRemaining(): any` — Get remaining todos
- `getWithCompleted(completed: Boolean): any`
- `remove(todo: Todo, ...theArgs: any[]): void` — Remove todo See Todo
- `removeCompleted(): void` — Remove completed todos
- `setAllTo(completed: boolean): void` — Set all todos status (completed or not) Example : // set all at completed TodoStore.setAllTo(true); Example : // set all at not completed TodoStore.setAllTo(false);
- `stopMonitoring(theTodo?: LabelledTodo): Promise<void>` — Stop monitoring the todo
- `toggleCompletion(todo: Todo): void` — Toggle completed todo status
- `update(): void` — Update store
- `updateStore(): void`

### NoopGuard

File: `src/app/shared/guards/noopguard.guard.ts`

Methods:
- `canActivate(): boolean` — Decide if a route can be activated

### Todo

File: `src/app/shared/models/todo.model.ts`

Description: The todo class See TodoStore for service using it

Properties:
- `_title: string` — Title
- `#newprivateproperty: boolean = false` — Another private property
- `completed: boolean` — Completed status
- `dir: Direction = Direction.Left`
- `editing: boolean` — Editing status
- `oneProperty: superString` — Just for Compodoc feature demo

Methods:
- `#clicked(): void`
- `classMethod(): string`
- `fakeMethod(): boolean` — fakeMethod !!

### ClockInterface

File: `src/app/shared/interfaces/clock.interface.ts`
Extends: `TimeInterface`

Description: A class interface just for documentation purpose Example : class Clock implements ClockInterface { currentTime: Date; constructor(h: number, m: number) { } }

Properties:
- `currentTime: Date` (deprecated: The current time property is deprecated) — The current time
- `zone: string` — The zone

Methods:
- `reset(): void` — A simple reset method

### SearchFunc

File: `src/app/shared/interfaces/interfaces.ts`

Description: A function type interface just for documentation purpose Example : let mySearch: SearchFunc; mySearch = function(source: string, subString: string) { let result = source.search(subString); if (result == -1) { return false; } else { return true; } }

Properties:
- `undefined`

  Defined in `src/app/about/about.routes.ts`

  Defined in `src/environments/environment.prod.ts`
